rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it "extends Bronnenberg, Dhar, and Dube (2007)" and is designed to replicate the cited paper’s core U.S. result in France using BDD-comparable specifications. Its contribution and research question are framed as a direct generalization/robustness test of the cited study’s geographic share-variation findings, not a passing background mention. The DOI-matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.44.1.4) and near-parallel titles further support a substantive linkage.
